---
title: "Schedule"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: FALSE
    code-copy: true
    highlight-style: github
    code-overflow: wrap
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Dates are placeholders for 2026. The course moves from sequence identification to raw reads, analysis workflows, interpretation, and final synthesis.
:::

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
## Weekly rhythm

Questions Tuesday. Assignment Friday. Project progress every week. Use [Skills](support.qmd) when an assignment asks for GitHub, Quarto, Raven, Hyak, containers, or archiving.
:::

::: {.schedule-table}
| Date | Questions | Bioinformatics Topic | Assignment | Project Status |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| **before class** |  | [Setup: your computer, Raven, Hyak](setup.qmd) | Complete 3 tutorials → open **Setup Check** issue | — |
| week 00 |  | [Bioinformatics habits and data provenance](lectures/00-before.qmd) | [Repository and data setup](assignments/00-bash.qmd) | Establish repos |
| week 01 | [week 01](questions/week01.md) | [Sequence databases and BLAST](lectures/01-start-up.qmd) | [NCBI BLAST](assignments/01-blast.qmd) | Open **project-proposal** issue |
| week 02 | [week 02](questions/week02.qmd) | [Raw reads, FASTQ, QC, and trimming](lectures/02-raw-reads-qc.qmd) | [FASTQ QC](assignments/02-fastq-qc.qmd) | Explore project data, QC, add hashes |
| week 03 | [week 03](questions/week03.qmd) | [Mapping, assembly, and quantification](lectures/03-mapping-quantification.qmd) | [Mapping or quantification workflow](assignments/03-mapping-quantification.qmd) | ID endpoint in README; start workflow |
| week 04 | [week 04](questions/week04.qmd) | [RNA-seq and differential expression](lectures/04-rna-seq-dge.qmd) | [Differential gene expression](assignments/04-DGE.qmd) | Complete sliced workflow → endpoint |
| week 05 | [week 05](questions/week05.qmd) | [Genome annotation and genomic ranges](lectures/05-annotation-ranges.qmd) | [Annotation and ranges](assignments/05-annotation-ranges.qmd) | **Mid-quarter project update** |
| week 06 | [week 06](questions/week06.qmd) | [Variants and population signals](lectures/06-variants.qmd) | [VCF and variant summary](assignments/06-variants.qmd) | README w/ results; 4-week plan; issues resolved |
| week 07 | [week 07](questions/week07.qmd) | [Epigenetics and DNA methylation](lectures/07-methylation.qmd) | [Methylation, motifs, IGV](assignments/07-CG.qmd) | Launch project report; all sections noted |
| week 08 | [week 08](questions/week08.qmd) | [eDNA and metabarcoding](lectures/edna.qmd) | [eDNA metabarcoding](assignments/edna-metabarcoding.qmd) | Mock ultimate figure |
| week 09 | [week 09](questions/week09.qmd) | [Project synthesis and biological interpretation](lectures/09-synthesis.qmd) | [Project synthesis](assignments/09-synthesis.qmd) | Clear repo organization |
| week 10 | [week 10](questions/week10.qmd) | [Final compendium and presentations](lectures/10-lastmile.qmd) | [Final release](assignments/10-compendium.qmd) | **Compendium** |
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<img src="https://img.shields.io/github/commit-activity/w/course-fish546-2026/course-fish546-2026" alt="GitHub commit activity"/>
